summary: TWO_COLUMN: lattice of slope ticks for dy/dx = y - x on axes LEFT; ValueTracker x_tr sweeps x0→1.8 and an always_redraw integral curve through (x0, y0)=(-2.2, -0.7) extends as a BLUE rider dot tracks the solution y = x+1-½e^(x-x_0). RIGHT column shows live x, y, dy/dx = y-x, and the closed form.
